---
title: "Announcement about Midterm, MAD213 Basic Statistics" 
description: "Rules"
date: 2020-11-27T08:00:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: []
comments: false
---



Dear all,

`r emo::ji("loudspeaker")` MAD213 - MIDTERM 1

Your midterm exam will be available at [evdekal.hacettepe.edu.tr](https://evdekal.hacettepe.edu.tr). It will be available today at 10h15 until 11h00.

We will be having discussion about exam rules via Zoom, prior to the exam, which will be starting at 10h00 as usual, like we did at lectures.


Good luck,

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("bar_chart")`
